since_last: 56% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.06%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.61% · BTC -3.57% · Gold -2.73% · Nasdaq100 +0.41%. 56% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.06%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.06%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +5.85%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +5.85%, ZBRA +4.00%, PUBM +3.91%, INTU +3.70%, PATH +3.69%. Laggards: SMR -4.74%, MDB -4.51%, OKLO -4.43%, OKLO -4.43%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.47% at $158.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
